DECLARE ps1 ANY; ps1 := http_pending_req(); SELECT * FROM TABLE(ps1) WHERE Client_IP_Address = '127.0.0.1';
DECLARE ps2 ANY; ps2 := http_pending_req(); SELECT * FROM TABLE(ps2) WHERE URL LIKE '/long.vsp';
DECLARE ps3 ANY; ps3 := http_pending_req(); SELECT * FROM TABLE(ps3) WHERE Process_Request_ID > 1000000;
DECLARE ps4 ANY; ps4 := http_pending_req(); SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TABLE(ps4);
DECLARE ps5 ANY; ps5 := http_pending_req(); SELECT Client_IP_Address, URL FROM TABLE(ps5) WHERE Client_IP_Address IN ('127.0.0.1', '192.168.1.1');
DECLARE ps6 ANY; ps6 := http_pending_req(); SELECT * FROM TABLE(ps6) ORDER BY Process_Request_ID DESC;
DECLARE ps7 ANY; ps7 := http_pending_req(); SELECT DISTINCT Client_IP_Address FROM TABLE(ps7);
CREATE TABLE TestPendingReq (ID INTEGER, Client_IP_Address VARCHAR(15), URL VARCHAR(255), Process_Request_ID INTEGER);
